mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO backtest_topk_summary ( task_id, top_k, cost_bps, trade_days, avg_net_return_bps, daily_win_rate, stock_win_rate, total_return_bps, max_single_day_loss_bps, avg_selected_count, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.taskId}, #{item.topK}, #{item.costBps}, #{item.tradeDays}, #{item.avgNetReturnBps}, #{item.dailyWinRate}, #{item.stockWinRate}, #{item.totalReturnBps}, #{item.maxSingleDayLossBps}, #{item.avgSelectedCount}, #{item.createdAt} )
